meta.title: Changelog — Aethyr
meta.description: Version history and release notes for the Aethyr MCP server for Unreal Engine 5.

article.heading: Changelog
article.lead: What's new in the Aethyr MCP server for Unreal Engine 5.

sections.heading: v0.1.0 — June 2026
sections.html:
Initial public release. The first build of the Aethyr MCP server with the full corruption-safe toolset.

What's included

  • 82 proven tools — 32 read, 47 write, 3 batch/audit operations
  • Compile gate — every write attempt is aborted if the Blueprint won't compile; broken graphs never get saved
  • Backup ring — an automatic timestamped copy of every touched asset is created before any write
  • Atomic batches — chain multiple edits into a single transaction; the whole batch rolls back if any step fails
  • Headless support — auto-routes each tool call to a live editor session or drives a headless editor; no open editor window required
  • Read-only by default — write tools require AETHYR_ALLOW_WRITE=1; reads never touch the disk
  • MCP client compatible — tested with Claude, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf, and Cline; works with any stdio MCP transport client
  • UE 5.4–5.8 verified — tested against real projects across the full 5.x release line

Known limitations in this build

  • Windows only (Linux and macOS headless builds planned)
  • UE 5.3 untested; UE 4.x not supported
